diagrams.title: 2D Rotation about Origin
diagrams.description: Shows a point P(x,y) being rotated to P'(x',y') around the origin by angle θ. Illustrates the trigonometric relationship and the rotation circle.
diagrams.purpose: Understand the basic rotation formula derivation and geometric interpretation

diagrams.title: Rotation Matrix Structure
diagrams.description: Visual representation of the 2x2 rotation matrix showing where cos, sin values are placed and how they transform unit vectors i and j.
diagrams.purpose: Visualize matrix structure and understand how basis vectors transform

diagrams.title: Pivot Rotation Process
diagrams.description: Three-step process: translate pivot to origin, rotate, translate back. Shows how to rotate about arbitrary point P(h,k).
diagrams.purpose: Understand composite transformation for pivot rotation

diagrams.title: Special Angle Rotations
diagrams.description: Shows positions of a point after 90°, 180°, 270°, and 360° rotations to understand special cases.
diagrams.purpose: Quick reference for common rotation angles and their effects
